---
title: "Jens Mayer"
page-layout: custom
image: "../../img/jens.jpg"
abstract: "Master Student"
date: 11-01-2023
about:
  template: trestles
comments: false
format:
  html:
    css: ../html/styles.scss
---


::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-5}
\
\


<div class="vertical-line">
</div>

<div  class="content">

  <img class="img-round" src="../../img/jens.jpg" alt="Avatar"> 

  <center>
  <a class="button-mail" role="button"><i class="bi-envelope"></i> jens.mayer | stud.uni-frankfurt.de</a>
  </center>
  
</div>

:::


::: {.g-col-5}

<p>&emsp;</p>

# Jens Mayer

## Education
**Master's student in Bioinformatics**, Goethe University Frankfurt, Germany \
**Bachelor of Science in Bioinformatics**, Goethe University Frankfurt, Germany

:::

:::
